candidate_check.description: Outlook must use remote procedure call (RPC) encryption to communicate with Microsoft Exchange servers.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Account Settings >> Exchange >> Enable RPC encryption is set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\outlook\rpc

If the value for enablerpcencryption is set to REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Account Settings >> Exchange >> Enable RPC encryption to "Enabled".
title: Outlook must use remote procedure call (RPC) encryption to communicate with Microsoft Exchange servers.
